figures.caption: Fig. 1. Cognitive analogy between hierarchical computer memory and text reasoning. Information Extraction functions as a bridge between raw text and the reasoning agent, mirroring the role of a hardware cache.

Fig. 2. Comparison of context mechanisms. Unlike (a) and (b) which treat raw text as a static read-only block, (c) IE-as-Cache introduces a dynamic Read-Write Cache. This mechanism filters noise by keeping the full text external and only maintaining semantically critical information in the active memory.
TABLE I MAIN EXPERIMENTAL RESULTS ACROSS THREE DATASETS. WE REPORT EXACT MATCH SCORE FOR TACT AND CALENDAR, AND ROUGE-1 SCORE FOR QMSUM. BEST RESULTS ARE MARKED IN BOLD.
